_note: Local tier models per hardware variant. render-configs.mjs picks a variant from uname -m (arm64 => mlx) unless RUFLO_MODEL_VARIANT (mlx|gguf) overrides. Values are BARE ollama tags; each gateway template applies its own provider prefix. tier-fast stays GGUF in both variants (qwen3.6:35b-a3b-q4_K_M runs on Apple-Silicon Metal and no 35b-mlx is assumed pulled); only heavy/private differ (mlx vs plain).
